examples: The town of Breckenridge and its namesake ski area could prosper under the plan.

He is putting together a four-man team, including his son and namesake Tony O'Reilly Jr.
Mental Floss, one of my favorite sites, has a namesake that conjures brain cleansing.
On a visit to the Journal's headquarters, his affinity for the prize's namesake becomes clear.
